How It Works

Learn first. Match better.

Real connection starts with self-awareness. Our badge system ensures every member brings knowledge and intention before swiping begins.

📧

Sign Up & Verify

Create your account with email verification. Complete your profile with photos, preferences, and relationship style.

📚

Earn 5 Foundation Badges

Complete interactive courses on consent, communication, sexual health, desire, and emotional intelligence — each with quizzes to test your knowledge.

🔓

Unlock Discovery

Once you earn all 5 foundation badges, Discovery opens — connecting you with educated, intentional members who’ve done the same work.

💜

Swipe, Match & Chat

Browse profiles with compatibility scores, swipe right, and start real-time conversations. Super Like standout profiles or boost your visibility.

The Badge System

Your knowledge is your profile.

Your badge collection tells the story of what you understand and value — not just what you look like. 20 badges across 5 progressive tiers.

🏛️

Foundation (Required)

Consent · Communication · Sexual Health · Desire · Emotional Intelligence

5 Badges
💊

Sexual Health & Function

Wellness · Pleasure · Common Concerns · Lifespan Sexuality

4 Badges
🌈

Identity & Diversity

Sexual Orientation · Gender Identity · Relationship Orientations · Intersectionality

4 Badges
🔗

Healthy Relationships

ENM Structures · Kink-Aware · Agreements · NVC & Boundaries

4 Badges
🎓

Advanced Topics

Sexual Trauma · Couples Dynamics · Long-Distance · Digital Safety

Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you don’t.

Built thoughtfully for people who take relationships seriously — whatever form those relationships take.

🎓

Education-First Discovery

Complete 5 foundation badge courses with interactive quizzes before unlocking swiping. Every member you meet has done the same work.

🔍

Compatibility Scoring

Our algorithm matches based on badge overlap, relationship style, interests, and values — not just location or looks.

💬

Real-Time Chat

Instant messaging with unread badges, typing indicators, and AI-powered message moderation to keep conversations respectful.

🛍️

Curated Shop

Browse our integrated merch and product store — support the community while expressing your identity.

⚡

Super Likes & Boosts

Stand out with Super Likes or boost your profile visibility. Available as one-time purchases or included in premium tiers.

🔥

Daily Challenges & Streaks

Earn XP through daily learning challenges, build combos, and climb the learning path. Keep your streak alive for bonus rewards.

🛑

Safety & Moderation

AI photo moderation, message flagging, report and block tools, and an education-first community culture.

🧭

Relationship Style Filters

Filter by monogamy, open, poly, solo poly, relationship anarchy, and more to find people who want what you want.

FAQ

Common questions.


What is Ethical Non-Monogamy (ENM)?
Ethical Non-Monogamy is an umbrella term for relationship structures where people have multiple romantic or sexual partners with everyone’s full knowledge and consent. This includes polyamory, open relationships, swinging, relationship anarchy, and more. Our app welcomes all relationship orientations — ENM, monogamous, and everything in between.
Do I have to be ENM or LGBTQ+ to join?
Not at all. Positive Thots is for anyone who wants to approach relationships with more intention, knowledge, and communication. We welcome everyone who shares our values of education, consent, and respect — regardless of orientation or relationship style.
How does the badge system work?
Each badge is earned by completing a course (multiple sections of reading content) followed by a quiz. The first 5 Foundation badges are required before Discovery unlocks — ensuring every member has a baseline of knowledge. Additional badges are optional deeper dives. Courses take about 10–20 minutes each and you go at your own pace. You also earn XP, build streaks, and can take on daily challenges.
Is my data private and secure?
Yes. We use row-level security on all database tables, meaning your data is only accessible to you and your matches. We never sell your data or use it for advertising. Sensitive profile information (sexuality, gender identity, relationship style) is only visible to authenticated app users — never publicly indexed.
What plans are available?
We offer three premium tiers: Plus ($4.99/mo) for seeing who likes you and 5 daily Super Likes; Premium ($9.99/mo, most popular) which adds Priority Visibility and Advanced Filters; and VIP ($19.99/mo) which includes everything plus a monthly Profile Boost, Unlimited Super Likes, and a Mentor Badge. You can also purchase one-time Profile Boosts ($2.99) and Super Like Packs ($1.99 for 10). All plans cancel anytime with no contracts.
What are Super Likes and Profile Boosts?
Super Likes let the other person know you’re especially interested — they see a special indicator on your profile. Profile Boosts temporarily increase your visibility in Discovery so more people see your profile. Both are included in premium tiers or available as one-time purchases.
Must I be 18 or older?
Yes, absolutely. You must be at least 18 years old to create an account or use any features of Positive Thots. Age is verified during signup and we reserve the right to terminate any account we believe belongs to a minor.
